originContent: # 🧠 Cursor DeepSeek V4 Proxy
translatedContent: # 🧠 Cursor DeepSeek V4 Proxy

originContent: > **一键修复 Cursor 使用 DeepSeek V4 时的 `reasoning_content` 错误，告别 `Rate limit exceeded`，让 AI Agent 模式稳定运行。**
translatedContent: > **One-click fix for the `reasoning_content` error when using DeepSeek V4 in Cursor, say goodbye to `Rate limit exceeded`, and make AI Agent mode run stably.**

originContent: [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/你的用户名/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy?style=social)](https://github.com/你的用户名/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy)
translatedContent: [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/你的用户名/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy?style=social)](https://github.com/你的用户名/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy)

originContent: [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
translatedContent: [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

originContent: ## 📌 你能用这个项目解决什么问题？
translatedContent: ## 📌 What problems can this project solve for you?

originContent: 如果你在 Cursor 中调用 DeepSeek V4（Pro / Flash）时，频繁遇到下面任意一种错误：
translatedContent: If you frequently encounter any of the following errors when calling DeepSeek V4 (Pro / Flash) in Cursor:

originContent: * `Provider returned error: The reasoning_content in the thinking mode must be passed back to the API.`
translatedContent: * `Provider returned error: The reasoning_content in the thinking mode must be passed back to the API.`

originContent: * `User API Key Rate limit exceeded`（明明配额还剩很多却报错）
translatedContent: * `User API Key Rate limit exceeded` (error despite plenty of quota left)

originContent: * `AI Model Not Found: deepseek-v4-pro`（后台任务报模型名无效）
translatedContent: * `AI Model Not Found: deepseek-v4-pro` (background task reports invalid model name)

originContent: * 聊天第一轮正常，第二轮就开始报错、中断
translatedContent: * The first round of chat works fine, but errors and interruptions start from the second round

originContent: **不用再折腾了，跟着本指南走 5 分钟就能彻底解决。**
translatedContent: **No need to struggle anymore, follow this guide and solve it completely in 5 minutes.**

originContent: > ⚠️  **2026-05-14 修复**：纯文本模型现已自动过滤图片，解决 502 错误。详见 [更新日志](#changelog)
translatedContent: > ⚠️  **Fixed on 2026-05-14**: Pure text models now automatically filter images, resolving 502 errors. See [Changelog](#changelog) for details.

originContent: ## ✨ 核心功能
translatedContent: ## ✨ Core Features

originContent: * ✅ **自动缓存 & 回传思维链**：再也不会因为 `reasoning_content` 缺失而报错。
translatedContent: * ✅ **Automatic caching & returning of reasoning chains**: no more errors caused by missing `reasoning_content`.

originContent: * ✅ **智能限流**：内置令牌桶，防止突发的并发请求打满免费额度。
translatedContent: * ✅ **Intelligent rate limiting**: built-in token bucket to prevent burst concurrent requests from maxing out free quota.

originContent: * ✅ **支持流式输出**：不影响 Cursor 的打字机渲染效果。
translatedContent: * ✅ **Supports streaming output**: does not affect Cursor’s typewriter rendering effect.

originContent: * ✅ **一键启动脚本**：Windows / macOS / Linux 通用，双击即可运行。
translatedContent: * ✅ **One-click start script**: works on Windows / macOS / Linux, just double-click to run.

originContent: * ✅ **透明日志**：终端会实时显示请求状态，方便排错。
translatedContent: * ✅ **Transparent logs**: terminal shows request status in real-time for easy troubleshooting.

originContent: * ✅ **零侵入**：不需要修改 Cursor 程序文件，只改一个 Base URL。
translatedContent: * ✅ **Zero intrusion**: no need to modify Cursor program files, only change one Base URL.

originContent: ## 🖥️ 适用环境
translatedContent: ## 🖥️ Supported Environments

originContent: | 操作系统 | 支持情况 |
translatedContent: | Operating System | Support Status |

originContent: | **Windows 10 / 11** | ✅ 支持 |
translatedContent: | **Windows 10 / 11** | ✅ Supported |

originContent: | **macOS** | ✅ 支持 |
translatedContent: | **macOS** | ✅ Supported |

originContent: | **Linux** | ✅ 支持 |
translatedContent: | **Linux** | ✅ Supported |

originContent: > **唯一要求**：安装 **Python 3.8** 或更高版本（安装时请务必勾选 `Add Python to PATH`）。
translatedContent: > **Only requirement**: Install **Python 3.8** or higher (be sure to check `Add Python to PATH` during installation).

originContent: ## 🚀 超详细三步上手（小白专用）
translatedContent: ## 🚀 Super Detailed Three-Step Getting Started (For Beginners)

originContent: ### 第一步：下载项目并安装依赖
translatedContent: ### Step 1: Download the project and install dependencies

originContent: 1.  下载本项目仓库的 ZIP 包，解压到本地（**路径请勿包含中文**）。
translatedContent: 1.  Download the ZIP package of this project repository and extract it locally (**please do not include Chinese characters in the path**).

originContent: 2.  进入解压后的文件夹，在文件夹地址栏输入 `cmd` 并回车，打开命令行窗口。
translatedContent: 2.  Enter the extracted folder, type `cmd` in the folder address bar and press Enter to open the command prompt.

originContent: 3.  执行以下命令安装依赖：
translatedContent: 3.  Run the following command to install dependencies:

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: pip install -r requirements.txt
translatedContent: pip install -r requirements.txt

originContent: *若提示 `pip不是内部命令`，请重新安装 Python 并勾选 `Add to PATH`。*
translatedContent: *If you see the prompt `pip is not an internal command`, please reinstall Python and check `Add to PATH`.*

originContent: ### 第二步：启动本地代理 + 隧道
translatedContent: ### Step 2: Start Local Proxy + Tunnel

originContent: 你需要一个隧道来生成公网地址（Cursor 限制访问 localhost）。
translatedContent: You need a tunnel to generate a public address (Cursor restricts access to localhost).

originContent: #### 🪟 Windows 用户
translatedContent: #### 🪟 Windows Users

originContent: 1.  确保文件夹内有 `cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe`（若无，请前往 [Cloudflare 官网](https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases) 下载）。
translatedContent: 1.  Make sure the folder contains `cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe` (if not, please download it from the [Cloudflare official site](https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases)).

originContent: 2.  双击运行 **`start_proxy.bat`**。
translatedContent: 2.  Double-click to run **`start_proxy.bat`**.

originContent: 3.  会弹出两个窗口。在**隧道窗口**中，找到一串 `https://xxx.trycloudflare.com` 的地址并**复制**。
translatedContent: 3.  Two windows will pop up. In the **tunnel window**, find a URL like `https://xxx.trycloudflare.com` and **copy** it.

originContent: #### 🍎 macOS / Linux 用户
translatedContent: #### 🍎 macOS / Linux Users

originContent: 1.  在终端中进入项目目录，运行：
translatedContent: 1.  Open the terminal, navigate to the project directory, and run:

originContent: ```bash
translatedContent: ```bash

originContent: bash start_proxy.sh
translatedContent: bash start_proxy.sh

originContent: 2.  稍等片刻，复制终端输出的 `https://xxx.trycloudflare.com` 地址。
translatedContent: 2.  Wait a moment, then copy the terminal output URL `https://xxx.trycloudflare.com`.

originContent: > ⚠️ **注意**：窗口不能关闭。隧道地址每次重启会变化，只要不关窗口就一直有效。
translatedContent: > ⚠️ **Note**: Do not close the window. The tunnel address changes each time it restarts, but it remains valid as long as the window stays open.

originContent: ### 第三步：配置 Cursor
translatedContent: ### Step 3: Configure Cursor

originContent: 1.  打开 Cursor 设置：按 `Ctrl+Shift+P` → 输入 `Cursor Settings`。
translatedContent: 1.  Open Cursor settings: press `Ctrl+Shift+P` → type `Cursor Settings`.

originContent: 2.  进入 **Models** 选项卡。
translatedContent: 2.  Go to the **Models** tab.

originContent: 3.  在 **"Override OpenAI Base URL"** 中，粘贴刚才复制的地址，并**在末尾加上 `/v1`**：
translatedContent: 3.  In **"Override OpenAI Base URL"**, paste the copied address, and **add `/v1` at the end**:

originContent: * 例如：`https://xxxxxx.trycloudflare.com/v1`
translatedContent: * For example: `https://xxxxxx.trycloudflare.com/v1`

originContent: 4.  在 API Key 处填入你的 **DeepSeek API Key**。
translatedContent: 4.  Enter your **DeepSeek API Key** in the API Key field.

originContent: 5.  **彻底退出并重启 Cursor**。
translatedContent: 5.  **Completely exit and restart Cursor**.

originContent: ## 🛡️ 修复 "Model name not valid" 错误
translatedContent: ## 🛡️ Fix "Model name not valid" Error

originContent: 如果在执行 Apply 或后台任务时报错，请按以下步骤操作：
translatedContent: If you encounter an error when running Apply or background tasks, follow these steps:

originContent: 1.  按 `Ctrl+Shift+P`，输入 `Preferences: Open User Settings (JSON)` 并回车。
translatedContent: 1.  Press `Ctrl+Shift+P`, type `Preferences: Open User Settings (JSON)` and press Enter.

originContent: 2.  在 JSON 的大括号 `{}` 内添加如下配置：
translatedContent: 2.  Add the following configuration inside the JSON braces `{}`:

originContent: ```json
translatedContent: ```json

originContent: "cursor.models": {
translatedContent: "cursor.models": {

originContent: "deepseek-v4-pro": {
translatedContent: "deepseek-v4-pro": {

originContent: "provider": "openai",
translatedContent: "provider": "openai",

originContent: "apiBase": "[https://你的隧道地址.trycloudflare.com/v1](https://你的隧道地址.trycloudflare.com/v1)",
translatedContent: "apiBase": "[https://你的隧道地址.trycloudflare.com/v1](https://你的隧道地址.trycloudflare.com/v1)",

originContent: "apiKey": "你的DeepSeek API Key"
translatedContent: "apiKey": "你的DeepSeek API Key"

originContent: 3.  保存并重启 Cursor。
translatedContent: 3.  Save and restart Cursor.

originContent: ## ❓ 常见问题 (FAQ)
translatedContent: ## ❓ FAQ

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>🔁 隧道地址变了怎么办？</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>🔁 What if the tunnel address changes?</summary>

originContent: 每次重启脚本都会生成新地址。你只需重新获取并更新到 Cursor 的 Base URL 即可。
translatedContent: A new address is generated every time the script restarts. You just need to retrieve it again and update the Base URL in Cursor.

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>💸 还是提示 Rate limit exceeded？</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>💸 Still getting "Rate limit exceeded"?</summary>

originContent: DeepSeek 免费层级频率极低。你可以编辑 `proxy.py`，将 `TokenBucket(rate=5/60.0, capacity=5)` 中的 `5` 调小（如 `3`），强制降低请求频率。
translatedContent: DeepSeek's free tier has a very low frequency limit. You can edit `proxy.py` and reduce the `5` in `TokenBucket(rate=5/60.0, capacity=5)` (e.g., to `3`) to forcibly lower the request frequency.

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>🚫 必须用隧道吗？能不能连 localhost？</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>🚫 Must I use a tunnel? Can I connect to localhost?</summary>

originContent: Cursor 出于安全原因禁止直接连接 `localhost`。Cloudflare Tunnel 是目前最简单、免费且无需注册的穿透方案。
translatedContent: Cursor forbids direct connections to `localhost` for security reasons. Cloudflare Tunnel is currently the simplest, free, and registration-free penetration solution.

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>🧪 代理会影响模型智商吗？</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>🧪 Does the proxy affect the model's intelligence?</summary>

originContent: 在 99% 的场景下无感知。代理仅是在模型“忘记”回传思维链时进行自动补全，确保对话不中断。
translatedContent: In 99% of scenarios, it is imperceptible. The proxy only automatically completes when the model "forgets" to return the thought chain, ensuring the conversation is uninterrupted.

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>🧪 为什么只有 200k context，不是 1M？</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>🧪 Why is there only 200k context, not 1M?</summary>

originContent: 这是 Cursor 的默认限制，不是代理问题。
translatedContent: This is the default limitation of Cursor, not the proxy issue.

originContent: Cursor 默认使用 200k context window。
translatedContent: Cursor uses a 200k context window by default.

originContent: 如需启用模型支持的 1M context，需要在 Cursor Chat 中开启 `Max Mode`。
translatedContent: To enable the 1M context supported by the model, you need to turn on `Max Mode` in Cursor Chat.

originContent: 路径：
translatedContent: Path:

originContent: Chat -> Model Selector -> Max Mode
translatedContent: Chat -> Model Selector -> Max Mode

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: ## ⚙️ 高级自定义
translatedContent: ## ⚙️ Advanced Customization

originContent: * **更换上游**：修改 `proxy.py` 中的 `UPSTREAM_URL`。
translatedContent: * **Change Upstream**: Modify the `UPSTREAM_URL` in `proxy.py`.

originContent: * **固定域名**：如果你有自己的域名，可以配置 Cloudflare 命名隧道（Persistent Tunnel）。
translatedContent: * **Fixed Domain**: If you have your own domain, you can configure a Cloudflare Named Tunnel (Persistent Tunnel).

originContent: ## 🆕 更新日志
translatedContent: ## 🆕 Changelog

originContent: ### 2026-05-14：纯文本模型图片兼容修复
translatedContent: ### 2026-05-14: Plain Text Model Image Compatibility Fix

originContent: **修复内容**
translatedContent: **Fix Details**

originContent: 当 Cursor 等客户端向 `deepseek-v4-pro`（纯文本模型）发送包含图片的消息时，代理层现在会自动过滤掉 `image_url` 内容块，仅保留文本部分。如果某条消息全部为图片（无文本），则替换为提示文本，避免模型收到空消息。
translatedContent: When clients like Cursor send messages containing images to `deepseek-v4-pro` (plain text model), the proxy layer now automatically filters out the `image_url` content blocks, keeping only the text part. If a message consists entirely of images (no text), it is replaced with a prompt text to avoid the model receiving an empty message.

originContent: 此修复解决了 DeepSeek API 返回 `"unknown variant image_url, expected text"` 导致的 502 错误。
translatedContent: This fix resolves the 502 error caused by DeepSeek API returning `"unknown variant image_url, expected text"`.

originContent: **额外改进**
translatedContent: **Additional Improvements**

originContent: - 统一上游错误返回格式，客户端将收到结构化的 JSON 错误（而非原始报错或空白页）。
translatedContent: - Unified upstream error response format, so clients receive structured JSON errors (instead of raw error messages or blank pages).

originContent: - 图片兼容逻辑对推理缓存 (`reasoning_content`) 无影响，历史消息处理保持正常。
translatedContent: - Image compatibility logic does not affect inference cache (`reasoning_content`), and historical message handling remains normal.

originContent: ### 致谢
translatedContent: ### Acknowledgments

originContent: 感谢 [@BG-ah](https://github.com/BG-ah) 在 Issue [#4](https://github.com/wustghj/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy/issues/4) 中反馈速率限制问题，以及 [@CH-nolyn](https://github.com/CH-nolyn) 的参与讨论。你们的反馈直接推动了本次兼容性修复，让代理在纯文本模型下运行得更稳定。
translatedContent: Thanks to [@BG-ah](https://github.com/BG-ah) for reporting the rate limit issue in Issue [#4](https://github.com/wustghj/cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy/issues/4), and to [@CH-nolyn](https://github.com/CH-nolyn) for participating in the discussion. Your feedback directly drove this compatibility fix, making the proxy run more stably under the plain text model.

originContent: > 💡 **提示**：如果你需要让模型真正理解图片内容，请将请求中的 `model` 字段改为支持多模态的 `deepseek-chat`，并确保你的 DeepSeek 账户已开通相应权限。
translatedContent: > 💡 **Tip**: If you want the model to truly understand image content, please change the `model` field in your request to the multimodal-supported `deepseek-chat`, and ensure your DeepSeek account has the corresponding permissions enabled.
